changelog: Internal: dependency refresh — bumped Compose BOM 2024.02 -> 2026.05 (M3 1.4.0 + UI 1.11.1), core-ktx 1.12 -> 1.18, activity-compose 1.8 -> 1.13, navigation-compose 2.7.7 -> 2.9.8.
